categories.intro: Bold flavours crafted to open the palate and set the tone for the evening ahead.

items.name: Golden Plantain Cups
items.desc: Crisp plantain cups filled with smoked barbecue chicken, finished with roasted sweet pepper glaze.

items.name: Crispy Calamari
items.desc: Buttermilk calamari rings served with dynamite sauce and charred lemon.

items.name: Tempura Prawns
items.desc: Lightly battered king prawns served with spicy Japanese mayo.

items.name: Tomato Bruschetta
items.desc: Toasted artisan bread topped with basil tomato concassé, olive oil, and shaved parmesan.

categories.intro: Crisp, colourful, and carefully composed — our salads are far from an afterthought.

items.name: Emerald Chicken Salad
items.desc: Shredded chicken, avocado, Chinese cabbage, carrot ribbons, sesame seed, lettuce, soft egg and bell peppers — finished with house mayo dressing.

items.name: Garden Harvest Salad
items.desc: Beetroot, cucumber ribbons, pickled onions, almond crumble, baby lettuce, carrots and citrus lemon vinaigrette.

categories.intro: House-perfected sauces, premium proteins and perfectly cooked pasta — elevated simplicity.

items.name: Chili Salmon Alfredo
items.desc: Creamy parmesan Alfredo tossed with pasta ribbons and finished with chili-glazed salmon.

items.name: Penne Arrabbiata
items.desc: Penne pasta in spicy tomato sauce with beef meatballs, parmesan and fresh herbs.

categories.intro: Premium cuts and bold theatre — from tableside flambé to edible gold, every grill dish is an occasion.

items.name: 24 Karat Tomahawk
items.desc: 1000g grilled tomahawk immersed in smoked brown butter, finished with edible gold and tableside cognac flambé.

items.name: The Monarch T-Bone
items.desc: Open air grilled T-bone steak finished with rosemary butter and red wine reduction.

items.name: Imperial Tenderloin
items.desc: Premium beef tenderloin with charred broccoli and peppercorn jus.

items.name: Level 3 Signature Flambé
items.desc: Sizzling grilled lamb chops glazed in smoked butter, finished with tableside cognac flambé.

items.name: Sirloin Steak Bites
items.desc: Chargrilled sirloin bites with creamy mashed potatoes, sautéed vegetables and red wine jus.

items.name: Slow-Braised Lamb Shank
items.desc: 400g braised lamb shank over creamy potato purée with peppercorn jus.

categories.intro: Sourced fresh and cooked with care — the finest the sea has to offer, served with flair.

items.name: Prawn-Stuffed Atlantic Salmon
items.desc: Oven roasted salmon filled with creamy garlic prawns, served with buttered jasmine rice.

items.name: Fire-Grilled Prawn Skewers
items.desc: Charred prawn kebabs served with butter potato wedges and pepper sauce.

items.name: Coastal Flame Tilapia
items.desc: Whole grilled tilapia with smoky jollof rice and butter sautéed vegetables.

categories.intro: Free-range, full flavour — our poultry dishes are anything but ordinary.

items.name: Thai Coconut Curry
items.desc: Slow simmered chicken curry in coconut cream with vegetables and steamed jasmine rice.

items.name: Crispy Chicken Lava
items.desc: Golden fried chicken breast covered with mozzarella, spicy arrabbiata sauce and French fries.

categories.intro: Thoughtfully crafted accompaniments to round out every dish.

items.name: Truffle Parmesan Frites
items.desc: Crispy hand-cut fries tossed with truffle oil, parmesan, and fresh herbs.

items.name: Smoky Party Jollof
items.desc: Long-grain rice slow-cooked in a rich, smoky tomato and pepper base.

items.name: Butter-Steamed Jasmine Rice
items.desc: Fragrant jasmine rice steamed with butter for a light, silky finish.

categories.intro: Signature sauces crafted to elevate every grill, seafood, and poultry dish.

items.name: Smoked Pepper Jus
items.desc: Rich, smoky pepper jus with depth and warmth — perfect for steaks and grills.

items.name: Peppercorn Sauce
items.desc: Creamy cracked peppercorn sauce with a bold, aromatic finish.

items.name: Creamy Mushroom Sauce
items.desc: Silky mushroom reduction with herbs — an elegant companion to tender cuts.

items.name: Red Wine Reduction
items.desc: Classic red wine glaze, slow-reduced for depth and glossy richness.

items.name: Chili Citrus Glaze
items.desc: Bright citrus notes balanced with gentle heat — a vibrant finishing glaze.
